name: Jeju Bank
summary: Jeju Bank Co., Ltd., a regional commercial bank, provides retail banking products and services in South Korea. It also provides credit card services. As of December 31, 2019, it operated through 38 branches. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Jeju-si, South Korea. Jeju Bank Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shinhan Financial Group Co., Ltd.
